python - <<'PY'
import zipfile, json
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]')
with zipfile.ZipFile(p) as zf:
    bad=zf.testzip()
    names=zf.namelist()
print(json.dumps({'path':str(p),'size_bytes':p.stat().st_size,'zip_test':'ok' if bad is None else bad,'parts':names}, indent=2))

python - <<'PY'
from zipfile import ZipFile
from xml.etree import ElementTree as ET
ns={'x':'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main'}
with ZipFile('[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]') as zf:
    scen=ET.fromstring(zf.read('xl/worksheets/sheet3.xml'))
    summary=ET.fromstring(zf.read('xl/worksheets/sheet1.xml'))
    formulas=[]
    for c in scen.findall('.//x:c', ns):
        f=c.find('x:f', ns)
        if f is not None:
            formulas.append((c.attrib.get('r'), f.text, (c.find('x:v', ns).text if c.find('x:v', ns) is not None else None)))
    summary_values=[]
    for ref in ['B3','B4','B5','B7','B8','B9','B10']:
        c=summary.find(f".//x:c[@r='{ref}']", ns)
        f=c.find('x:f', ns) if c is not None else None
        v=c.find('x:v', ns) if c is not None else None
        summary_values.append((ref, f.text if f is not None else None, v.text if v is not None else None))
print('scenario_formula_count', len(formulas))
print('first_12_scenario_formulas')
for item in formulas[:12]:
    print(item)
print('summary_key_cells')
for item in summary_values:
    print(item)
PY

python - <<'PY'
from zipfile import ZipFile
from xml.etree import ElementTree as ET
ns={'x':'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main'}
with ZipFile('[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]') as zf:
    scen=ET.fromstring(zf.read('xl/worksheets/sheet3.xml'))
    summary=ET.fromstring(zf.read('xl/worksheets/sheet1.xml'))
    formulas=[]
    for c in scen.findall('.//x:c', ns):
        f=c.find('x:f', ns)
        if f is not None:
            formulas.append((c.attrib.get('r'), f.text, (c.find('x:v', ns).text if c.find('x:v', ns) is not None else None)))
    summary_values=[]
    for ref in ['B3','B4','B5','B7','B8','B9','B10']:
        c=summary.find(f".//x:c[@r='{ref}']", ns)
        f=c.find('x:f', ns) if c is not None else None
        v=c.find('x:v', ns) if c is not None else None
        summary_values.append((ref, f.text if f is not None else None, v.text if v is not None else None))
print('scenario_formula_count', len(formulas))
print('first_12_scenario_formulas')
for item in formulas[:12]:
    print(item)
print('summary_key_cells')
for item in summary_values:
    print(item)
PY

steps.input:
python - <<'PY'
density=805.0; g=9.81; vp=72.0; sp=248.0; static=1.8; loss=0.9; budget=95000
points=[('P1',1.9,3.6),('P2',2.4,4.7),('P3',2.9,6.1)]
scenarios=[('Baseline / no mitigation',0,0,0),('Larger strainer',1,0,0),('Lower speed',0,1,0),('Boost pump',0,0,1),('Larger strainer + lower speed',1,1,0),('Larger strainer + boost pump',1,0,1),('Lower speed + boost pump',0,1,1),('All mitigations',1,1,1)]
for name,large,lower,boost in scenarios:
    cost=large*48000+lower*22000+boost*91000
    suction=sp+boost*35
    line=loss-large*0.45
    mult=0.88 if lower else 1
    npsha=(suction-vp)*1000/(density*g)+static-line
    ms=[npsha-npshr*mult for _,_,npshr in points]
    status='EXCLUDED_BY_BUDGET' if cost>budget else ('PASS' if min(ms)>=1.5 else 'WARN' if min(ms)>=1 else 'FAIL')
    print(f"| {name} | ${cost:,.0f} | {'Yes' if cost<=budget else 'No'} | {npsha:.3f} | {ms[0]:.3f} | {ms[1]:.3f} | {ms[2]:.3f} | P{ms.index(min(ms))+1} | {status} |")
print('pressure_head', (sp-vp)*1000/(density*g))
print('sensitivity', 1000/(density*g))
print('p3 above pass', ((sp-vp)*1000/(density*g)+static-loss-6.1)-1.5)
print('pressure drop to warn', (((sp-vp)*1000/(density*g)+static-loss-6.1)-1.5)/(1000/(density*g)))
PY

inputs.cmd:
python - <<'PY'
density=805.0; g=9.81; vp=72.0; sp=248.0; static=1.8; loss=0.9; budget=95000
points=[('P1',1.9,3.6),('P2',2.4,4.7),('P3',2.9,6.1)]
scenarios=[('Baseline / no mitigation',0,0,0),('Larger strainer',1,0,0),('Lower speed',0,1,0),('Boost pump',0,0,1),('Larger strainer + lower speed',1,1,0),('Larger strainer + boost pump',1,0,1),('Lower speed + boost pump',0,1,1),('All mitigations',1,1,1)]
for name,large,lower,boost in scenarios:
    cost=large*48000+lower*22000+boost*91000
    suction=sp+boost*35
    line=loss-large*0.45
    mult=0.88 if lower else 1
    npsha=(suction-vp)*1000/(density*g)+static-line
    ms=[npsha-npshr*mult for _,_,npshr in points]
    status='EXCLUDED_BY_BUDGET' if cost>budget else ('PASS' if min(ms)>=1.5 else 'WARN' if min(ms)>=1 else 'FAIL')
    print(f"| {name} | ${cost:,.0f} | {'Yes' if cost<=budget else 'No'} | {npsha:.3f} | {ms[0]:.3f} | {ms[1]:.3f} | {ms[2]:.3f} | P{ms.index(min(ms))+1} | {status} |")
print('pressure_head', (sp-vp)*1000/(density*g))
print('sensitivity', 1000/(density*g))
print('p3 above pass', ((sp-vp)*1000/(density*g)+static-loss-6.1)-1.5)
print('pressure drop to warn', (((sp-vp)*1000/(density*g)+static-loss-6.1)-1.5)/(1000/(density*g)))
PY

python - <<'PY'
density=805.0; g=9.81; vp=72.0; sp=248.0; static=1.8; loss=0.9; budget=95000
points=[('P1',1.9,3.6),('P2',2.4,4.7),('P3',2.9,6.1)]
scenarios=[('Baseline / no mitigation',0,0,0),('Larger strainer',1,0,0),('Lower speed',0,1,0),('Boost pump',0,0,1),('Larger strainer + lower speed',1,1,0),('Larger strainer + boost pump',1,0,1),('Lower speed + boost pump',0,1,1),('All mitigations',1,1,1)]
for name,large,lower,boost in scenarios:
    cost=large*48000+lower*22000+boost*91000
    suction=sp+boost*35
    line=loss-large*0.45
    mult=0.88 if lower else 1
    npsha=(suction-vp)*1000/(density*g)+static-line
    ms=[npsha-npshr*mult for _,_,npshr in points]
    status='EXCLUDED_BY_BUDGET' if cost>budget else ('PASS' if min(ms)>=1.5 else 'WARN' if min(ms)>=1 else 'FAIL')
    print(f"| {name} | ${cost:,.0f} | {'Yes' if cost<=budget else 'No'} | {npsha:.3f} | {ms[0]:.3f} | {ms[1]:.3f} | {ms[2]:.3f} | P{ms.index(min(ms))+1} | {status} |")
print('pressure_head', (sp-vp)*1000/(density*g))
print('sensitivity', 1000/(density*g))
print('p3 above pass', ((sp-vp)*1000/(density*g)+static-loss-6.1)-1.5)
print('pressure drop to warn', (((sp-vp)*1000/(density*g)+static-loss-6.1)-1.5)/(1000/(density*g)))

task: Advanced high-economic-value task: Cryogenic Pump Cavitation Margin Acceptance Analysis. Context: a launch team must decide whether a liquid-transfer skid can run three requested duty points without cavitation damage after a supplier changed the suction strainer. Embedded packet: fluid=LOX-like service; density_kg_m3=805; vapor_pressure_kPa=72; suction_pressure_kPa=248; static_head_m=1.8; line_loss_m=0.9; duty_points: P1 flow_kg_s=1.9 npshr_m=3.6, P2 flow_kg_s=2.4 npshr_m=4.7, P3 flow_kg_s=2.9 npshr_m=6.1; mitigation options: larger_strainer reduces line_loss by 0.45m cost=48000, lower_speed reduces all npshr by 12% cost=22000, boost_pump raises suction_pressure by 35kPa cost=91000; budget_usd=95000. Rules and constraints: NPSHa=(suction_pressure_kPa-vapor_pressure_kPa)*1000/(density_kg_m3*9.81)+static_head_m-line_loss_m; margin=NPSHa-NPSHr; margin<1.0m fail, 1.0-1.5m warn, otherwise pass; mitigations can be combined only when total cost is within budget. Required work: calculate baseline and feasible mitigation margins, identify the cheapest passing package, and provide a release/no-release recommendation. Deliver npsh_margin_workbook.xlsx + release_memo.md with formulas or executable logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, explicit assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity notes where relevant, and a final decision table. Do not invent inputs, substitute outside data, or hide uncertainty; mark any unresolved ambiguity as needs_review.
